probes.name: approvals-registry-seeded
probes.description: approvable_actions table has at least 1 row (boot-time discovery ran + inserted decorated actions). Zero rows suggests discovery failed or nothing decorates yet.

probes.name: approvals-templates-consistent
probes.description: Every (tenant, application, action_key, name) group has AT MOST one is_active=true row (defensive check of the observer's enforcement). Alerts on drift → ReconcileTemplateVersionsJob handles the fix.

probes.name: approvals-executor-not-wedged
probes.description: Zero approval_instances in the wedged state (status='approved' AND executed_at IS NULL AND updated_at older than 1 hour). Non-zero = immediate human intervention required via approvals:remediate-failed-executions.

probes.name: approvals-sweep-not-lagging
probes.description: The ExpireOverdueApprovalsJob's last run finished within the last 2× config('approvals.expiration.sweep_frequency_minutes'). Lag suggests the queue worker is falling behind — instances past expires_at aren't transitioning.

probes.name: approvals-reminders-not-lagging
probes.description: The DispatchApprovalRemindersJob's last run finished within the last 2 hours (job runs hourly). Lag = approvers not getting timely nudges.

probes.name: approvals-expression-cache-reachable
probes.description: Redis expression-cache namespace reachable. Falls back to always-recompile on failure (correctness preserved; performance degraded).

probes.name: approvals-symfony-expression-language-loaded
probes.description: symfony/expression-language package resolvable. Zero-hit → the engine cannot evaluate any expression → all instance-creates would fail. Package integrity check.

probes.name: approvals-audit-trail-integrity
probes.description: Zero approval_decisions rows exist where approver_id NOT IN the parent requirement.resolved_approvers (defensive check of the observer's enforcement — a leak indicates the observer was bypassed by a direct DB write).

probes.name: approvals-security-violations-low
probes.description: Rolling 15-minute count of ApprovalSecurityViolation events is under 5. Above 5 → the module fires a P0 alert to #security-alerts (metric-based; this probe is a redundant safety net).
